content.problemStatement:
You are given a sequence of distinct non-negative integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.

For every non-negative integer x<2Kx \lt 2^Kx<2K, let's define a function f(x)f(x)f(x) as the number of inversions in the sequence A1‚äēx,A2‚äēx,‚Ä¶,AN‚äēxA_1 \oplus x, A_2 \oplus x, \dots, A_N \oplus xA1‚Äč‚äēx,A2‚Äč‚äēx,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč‚äēx. (An inversion in a sequence X1,X2,‚Ä¶,XNX_1, X_2, \dots, X_NX1‚Äč,X2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,XN‚Äč is a pair of indices (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) such that i<ji \lt ji<j and Xi>XjX_i \gt X_jXi‚Äč>Xj‚Äč.)

Consider the sorted sequence of pairs (f(x),x)(f(x), x)(f(x),x) for all integers x‚ąą[0,2K‚ąí1]x \in [0, 2^K - 1]x‚ąą[0,2K‚ąí1]; a pair (f(x1),x1)(f(x_1), x_1)(f(x1‚Äč),x1‚Äč) is earlier than (f(x2),x2)(f(x_2), x_2)(f(x2‚Äč),x2‚Äč) in this sequence if f(x1)<f(x2)f(x_1) \lt f(x_2)f(x1‚Äč)<f(x2‚Äč), or if f(x1)=f(x2)f(x_1) = f(x_2)f(x1‚Äč)=f(x2‚Äč) and x1<x2x_1 \lt x_2x1‚Äč<x2‚Äč. You should find the second element (i.e. the number xxx) of the PPP-th pair in this sequence. The sequence is indexed from 1.
constraints: the elements of AAA are pairwise distinct
the sum of NNN for all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
the sum of NNN for all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
the sum of NNN for all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and PPP.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the number xxx generating the PPP-th pair in the sorted sequence.
